base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of game_over_continue_font — a ui (menu_screen) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Game Over + Continue screens + ASCII font (519×257 canvas — ~60 font glyphs + 2 screen-layouts). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Game Over + Continue screens + ASCII font (519×257 canvas — ~60 font glyphs + 2 screen-layouts)
